pattern: \[HS\] the pre-remdiation detection script compliance result for (?<id>[a-z0-9]{8}-[a-z0-9]{4}-[a-z0-9]{4}-[a-z0-9]{4}-[a-z0-9]{12}) is (?<compliance>True|False)
description: Captures the detection compliance result for a remediation script. True = compliant (no remediation needed), False = non-compliant (remediation will run).
